title: Cropin is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Cropin is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Cropin invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cropin:
Cropin is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin!
